Flood Prediction

Live 14-Day Flood Forecast for Sandusky River Watershed, Western Lake Erie Basin, Ohio

Today's Date2026-05-31 Updated2026-05-31 04:37 AM EDT Forecast Window2026-05-31 to 2026-06-13

Interactive Dashboard

14-Day Stream Water-Level Forecast, Runoff/Storage Scenarios, and Flood Stage Classification

Machine learning algorithm

Random Forest

Model Development

Calibrated, validated, and tested using ~18.3 years of historical daily data (2007-2026) obtained from USGS and ERA5

Features

Uses hydrologic lag, rolling precipitation, antecedent wetness, and seasonal features

Future precipitation obtained from basin-average Open-Meteo forecasts

Flood-stage classification

  • Action
  • Minor flood
  • Moderate flood
  • Major flood

Preventative-action scenario testing

  • 10% runoff reduction
  • 20% runoff reduction
  • 2.5 mm storage
  • 5 mm storage

Runoff reduction and increased storage could be achieved through detention basins, wetlands, floodplain reconnection, two-stage ditches, controlled drainage, saturated buffers, cover crops, conservation tillage, grassed waterways, and urban green infrastructure.
